title: Prefix-speculation landing queue (replaces batch-merger design): single-writer composer verifies queue prefixes concurrently with an AIMD window — positional culprit-finding, no bisection machinery
summary: v2 after web research — the original wave-batch-merger design is SUPERSEDED by the Zuul/GitHub-queue prefix model, which is strictly better at 3-10 lanes: batch-then-bisect wastes a bisection subsystem that prefix structure gives for free. Design: lanes never push main; a single-writer composer (Cognition principle: writes stay single-threaded — applies to landing) maintains a FIFO of PASS lane candidates and builds composed candidate trees as queue PREFIXES (L1, L1+L2, L1+L2+L3), verifying them concurrently with the native gate set (compile/tests/ACS/apicover). First failing prefix names the culprit positionally; lanes behind re-form without it (Zuul NNFI). Window size is NOT a constant: AIMD control loop — start 3, +1 per green landing, halve on red, floor 1 (Zuul window-increase/decrease-factor precedent) — self-tunes to the fleet's actual pass rate. Risk-tier lanes at audit time like Rust rollups (rollup=always for docs/tests-only, maybe for normal, iffy for core/cross-cutting => iffy gets a solo prefix slot; overlap-zone changes forbidden from sharing prefixes). Reuses composition-verdict plumbing (deps) for verdict carry-forward within prefixes; one remote CI watch per landed prefix instead of per lane. Config via policy fleet block (landing: per-lane|prefix-queue), not env flags. Only worth enabling at width >= 3; essential at width 10 (measured: per-lane racing produced 10 audits/8 cycles).
acceptance: RED: TestPrefixQueue_PositionalCulpritEjectsAndReforms (3 lanes, middle one poisoned: others land without bisection)
RED: TestPrefixQueue_IffyTierGetsSoloSlot; overlap-zone lanes never share a prefix
RED: single-writer composer holds the only main-push path in fleet mode; ledger chains lane audits + prefix tree SHAs
batch soak at width 3: zero AUDIT_BINDING_HEAD_MOVED, remote CI watches == landed prefixes; go test -race PASS; apicover clean
source: operator ultrathink + web research 2026-07-13 (Zuul AIMD window, Uber speculation, Rust rollup tiers; knowledge-base/research/merge-concurrency-2026)
